sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87547" key="pro/qusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρό-θῠσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n87547.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">base of an altar,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5:13:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.13.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
